MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar May-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALISA J. KIM, TEL. NO. 1-510-736-6293 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank's motion to change venue is granted. The case is transferred to San Diego County. Plaintiff is to pay all transfer fees. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =302/hk
